title: This Beach Glows with Nature's Magic

scenes.text: Witness a beach that glows at night!
scenes.query: Vaadhoo Island bioluminescent beach at night

scenes.text: The phenomenon is caused by tiny plankton.
scenes.query: Vaadhoo Island plankton glowing in water

scenes.text: It transforms into a mesmerizing blue paradise.
A magical experience unlike any other!
scenes.query: Vaadhoo Island tranquil ocean at night

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: Explore the enchanting Vaadhoo Island, a beach where the water glows like a starry night. Join us for more magical destinations around the globe!
